title: Receive a Fax to Monday
excerpt: Is there a way to receive a fax on a monday column?

posts.author: Mrjoelbaker (Joel baker)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to receive a fax on a monday column?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there! Not at the moment but you could add scanned or emailed files to a files column if that would work instead? Let us know what you think!

posts.author: YannD (Yann Dehuy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Mrjoelbaker

You have to do it with make.com, using an efax to receive a fax in pdf.
On make, set up a line creation at the reception of the mail with the addition of the document in attachment
